{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content Creator / Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Prixair Group is a diversified Nigerian Companyheadquartered in Abuja.The Group operates across multiple sectors, including Solid minerals mining, hospitality, Media, supermarkets, laundry and Cleaning services, and restaurants (food services). Through its portfolio of businesses, Prixair focuses on delivering quality products and services while driving innovation, operational excellence, and customer-focused experiences across Nigeria. Guided by its core values of knowledge, integrity, teamwork, innovation, and professionalism, the Group continues to expand its footprint, with a vision to become a global enterprise providing quality services and solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator / Digital Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Gudu, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Create high-quality content (graphics, videos, blogs, and social media posts) aligned with brand goals
	Manage and grow social media platforms (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.)
	Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns (email marketing, paid ads, SEO)
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using analytics tools
	Develop content calendars and ensure consistent posting
	Optimize content for SEO and audience engagement
	Collaborate with internal teams to align marketing strategies with business objectives
	Stay updated on industry trends and digital marketing tools.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;Prixairhumanresources@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Content Creator / Digital Marketer Job at Prixair Group




        
    

        
        Prixair Group is a diversified Nigerian Companyheadquartered in Abuja.The Group operates across multiple sectors, including Solid minerals mining, hospitality, Media, supermarkets, laundry and Cleaning services, and restaurants (food services). Through its portfolio of businesses, Prixair focuses on delivering quality products and services while driving innovation, operational excellence, and customer-focused experiences across Nigeria. Guided by its core values of knowledge, integrity, teamwork, innovation, and professionalism, the Group continues to expand its footprint, with a vision to become a global enterprise providing quality services and solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Content Creator / Digital Marketer

Job Location: Gudu, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Create high-quality content (graphics, videos, blogs, and social media posts) aligned with brand goals
	Manage and grow social media platforms (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.)
	Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns (email marketing, paid ads, SEO)
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using analytics tools
	Develop content calendars and ensure consistent posting
	Optimize content for SEO and audience engagement
	Collaborate with internal teams to align marketing strategies with business objectives
	Stay updated on industry trends and digital marketing tools.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Audit & Compliance Lead",
  "description": "Dash Microfinance Bank Limited is a fully licensed financial institution established to deliver credit-led, technology-powered banking services to underserved individuals and small businesses in Nigeria.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Internal Audit &amp; Compliance Lead

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	This role is to safeguard the bank&#39;s integrity, assets and operations by ensuring compliance with laws and regulations, and providing independent assurance through audits, in line with the bank&#39;s digital operational model.


Responsibilities
Internal Audit:


	Plan and execute the internal audit program covering all business and operational areas.
	Conduct audits Of core banking systems, digital payment platforms, and operational processes.
	Report audit findings with actionable recommendations to management and the Board Audit &amp; Risk Committee
	Follow up on the implementation of agreed audit recommendations.


Compliance Management:


	Monitor and ensure adherence to CBN regulations, NDIC guidelines, BOFIA, with NFIU and other bodies AML/CFT rules, Data Protection laws, and other statutory requirements.
	Develop and implement compliance frameworks, policies, and procedures.
	Serve as the bank&#39;s Money Laundering Reporting Officer (MLRO) and ensure timely filing Of returns
	Conduct compliance risk assessments across all business units.
	Advise management on risk exposures and emerging threats.


Digital Operations Oversight


	Review and monitor transaction monitoring systems for suspicious activities.
	Ensure reconciliation between core banking, payment gateways, and settlement systems.
	Support cyber and data security compliance in collaboration with IT.


Training &amp; Awareness


	Conduct periodic compliance, risk, and control training for staff
	Promote a strong risk and compliance culture across the organization.


Reporting &amp; Governance:


	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual compliance and risk reports to management and regulators
	Maintain strong relationships with regulators, auditors, and other oversight bodies.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;ochuwa.edioye@dash-mfb.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Internal Audit & Compliance Lead Job at Dash Microfinance Bank Limited




        
    

        
        Dash Microfinance Bank Limited is a fully licensed financial institution established to deliver credit-led, technology-powered banking services to underserved individuals and small businesses in Nigeria. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Audit & Compliance Lead

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	This role is to safeguard the bank's integrity, assets and operations by ensuring compliance with laws and regulations, and providing independent assurance through audits, in line with the bank's digital operational model.


Responsibilities
Internal Audit:


	Plan and execute the internal audit program covering all business and operational areas.
	Conduct audits Of core banking systems, digital payment platforms, and operational processes.
	Report audit findings with actionable recommendations to management and the Board Audit & Risk Committee
	Follow up on the implementation of agreed audit recommendations.


Compliance Management:


	Monitor and ensure adherence to CBN regulations, NDIC guidelines, BOFIA, with NFIU and other bodies AML/CFT rules, Data Protection laws, and other statutory requirements.
	Develop and implement compliance frameworks, policies, and procedures.
	Serve as the bank's Money Laundering Reporting Officer (MLRO) and ensure timely filing Of returns
	Conduct compliance risk assessments across all business units.
	Advise management on risk exposures and emerging threats.


Digital Operations Oversight


	Review and monitor transaction monitoring systems for suspicious activities.
	Ensure reconciliation between core banking, payment gateways, and settlement systems.
	Support cyber and data security compliance in collaboration with IT.


Training & Awareness


	Conduct periodic compliance, risk, and control training for staff
	Promote a strong risk and compliance culture across the organization.


Reporting & Governance:


	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual compliance and risk reports to management and regulators
	Maintain strong relationships with regulators, auditors, and other oversight bodies.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "HRHub.ng Limited is a Human Resource Development &amp; Management Consulting practice firm located in Lagos. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Front Desk Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a professional and courteous Front Desk Officer to serve as the first point of contact for visitors and clients.
	The ideal candidate will manage front desk operations, handle inquiries, and provide administrative support to ensure smooth day-to-day office activities.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and attend to visitors, clients, and staff in a professional manner.
	Answer, screen, and direct incoming calls and emails.
	Manage appointment scheduling and meeting room bookings.
	Receive, sort, and distribute mail and deliveries.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and presentable reception area.
	Provide administrative support such as data entry, filing, and documentation.
	Coordinate with internal departments to ensure smooth communication.
	Monitor visitor logs and maintain security procedures.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration or a related field.
	1 - 3 years of experience in a front desk, receptionist, or administrative role.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Professional appearance and customer service orientation.
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.


Key Skills;


	Communication and customer service
	Organization and time management
	Attention to detail
	Multitasking ability
	Professionalism.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@hrhub.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Front Desk Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",
